4 = Region — the managed care entity provides services to beneficiaries in specified regions, not 
defined by individual counties within the state (“region” is state-defined). 
5 = Zip code — the managed care entity program provides services to beneficiaries in specified zip 
codes. 
6 = Other — the managed care entity provides services to beneficiaries in "other" area(s), not 
statewide, county, city, or region. 
Null/missing = unknown/missing
